summary: The production change is correct: .omp/AGENTS.md now reports 10 command files and lists git-clean.md in the tree block. Prior npm-release evidence was stale and has been replaced with branch-accurate verification. README.md still mentions /npm-release, but that mismatch predates this PR and is outside the production diff for this bead.

passedChecks.result: brainstorm.md, close.md, create.md, git-clean.md, init.md, plan.md, pr.md, review.md, ship.md, verify.md

passedChecks.expected: No modified or untracked command files
Command Reference already includes /git-clean exactly once
passedChecks.result: Observed `/git-clean` row in the Command Reference table; no production edit needed there

passedChecks.expected: Tree block says 10 command files and lists git-clean.md
passedChecks.result: Observed `Slash commands (10)` and final wrapped listing `init.md, git-clean.md`
Diff changes only the tree count 9→10 and the wrapped listing init.md→init.md, git-clean.md

uncheckedRisks: README.md still documents /npm-release instead of /git-clean. This drift predates the current production diff and was not introduced by this PR.
followUps: Open a separate bead to reconcile README.md with the tracked command inventory and .omp/AGENTS.md Command Reference.
Treat any prior npm-release-specific evidence in this bead as superseded by this file.
